emails.subject: Enterprise playbook
emails.body: Hi Alex, the SaaS companies winning enterprise deals fastest all share one pattern: they make trust verification a self-serve experience, not a security team bottleneck.

emails.subject: PLG meets enterprise
emails.body: Alex, product-led companies moving upmarket face a unique challenge: enterprise buyers need security proof, but adding friction kills the PLG motion. The best teams automate this entirely.

emails.subject: The PLG-enterprise bridge
emails.body: A SaaS productivity tool like Notion automated trust verification and cut their enterprise sales cycle by 3 weeks. Their PLG motion stayed frictionless while enterprise deals closed faster.

emails.subject: Quick read
emails.body: Alex, put together a short piece on how PLG companies handle the enterprise trust gap without adding friction. Relevant to where Notion is heading. Worth 3 minutes?

emails.subject: Last one
emails.body: Alex, I'll leave it here. If the PLG-to-enterprise trust challenge comes up in your planning, I'd enjoy the conversation. Wishing Notion continued success.
